fixed_normalizer_transition_table.name: standard redundant Fibonacci carry table used by the arithmetic-window verifier
fixed_normalizer_transition_table.terminal_output_convention: the verifier applies the terminal flush specified in the paper before visible truncation

kernel_residual_and_rank_records.rank_lower_witness: the d_q by d_q leading Hankel minor in R_q B_q is nonzero; see smith/nullmode record
kernel_residual_and_rank_records.rank_upper_witness: columns >= d_q reduce by the same residual companion relation modulo the recorded zero residual block
